games.title: Panda Platforms
games.description: Hop across bamboo platforms rising through misty mountain peaks. Bamboo Hopper scales the Jade Summit leaping between swaying stalks and avoiding thorny vines.
games.objective: Master the platformer challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Panda Glide
games.description: Guide a flying panda through sky gardens filled with cherry trees and pagodas. Panda Flutter uses leaf-shaped wings to catch updrafts between cloud platforms.
games.objective: Master the flappy challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Bamboo Pop
games.description: Whack mischievous bamboo sprites peeking from hollow stalks. Bamboo Whacker defends the grove with precision timing as sprites pop up faster each wave.
games.objective: Master the whack challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Panda Match
games.description: Swap and match bamboo tokens decorated with panda faces in the Temple of Taste. Panda Matcha guides through matcha-green boards where chain reactions bloom like cherry blossoms.
games.objective: Master the match-3 challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Panda Merge
games.description: Drag and merge bamboo shoots to grow a panda paradise. Panda Alchemist starts with a sprout and cultivates a forest filled with playful pandas and golden stalks.
games.objective: Master the merge challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Bamboo Tower
games.description: Defend the ancient Bamboo Tower from hungry red pandas using spiky branches and honey pots. Panda Guardian places defenses along the spiral staircase.
games.objective: Master the tower defense challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Bamboo Stack
games.description: Stack bamboo logs with perfect precision as each layer narrows toward the sky. Panda Stacker builds the tallest pagoda balancing green segments in this zen challenge.
games.objective: Master the stacker challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Panda Memory
games.description: Flip bamboo scrolls to reveal matching panda emblems in the Hall of Ancestors. Panda Scholar deciphers ancient patterns across increasingly complex memory puzzles.
games.objective: Master the memory challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Bamboo Break
games.description: Bounce a panda pellet through layers of bamboo bricks and lotus barriers. Panda Breaker aims for perfect ricochets to clear the board and reveal hidden garden paths.
games.objective: Master the breakout challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Panda Bounce
games.description: Bounce a springy panda upward through cherry blossom clouds above the kingdom. Panda Bouncer rebounds between floral platforms to reach the sky gardens.
games.objective: Master the climber challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Bamboo Maze
games.description: Navigate a winding bamboo maze to find the hidden panda shrine. Panda Explorer weaves through living hedges collecting ancient wisdom scrolls along the path.
games.objective: Master the maze challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Panda Parkour
games.description: Leap across crumbling neon rooftops in a glitchy pixel metropolis. Pixel Panda vaults over data gaps and slides under lasers in this retro platformer set inside a corrupted video game world.
games.objective: Master the platformer challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Prawn: Deep Sea Debugger
games.description: Dive into a sunken data vault of corrupted memory fragments. Pixel Prawn swaps debug tokens to match three or more cleaning the ocean of bugs one cascade at a time.
games.objective: Master the match-3 challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Fox Speedrun
games.description: A wildfire of pixels races through a burning forest of code. Pixel Fox sprints through glitch-filled levels vaulting over corrupted data blocks in this high-speed retro runner.
games.objective: Master the runner challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Bunny Hover
games.description: Float through a dreamscape of floating islands and pixelated clouds. Pixel Bunny hovers across gaps using magical carrot power collecting radishes in this serene pixel flapper.
games.objective: Master the flappy challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Raccoon Dig
games.description: Raccoons keep popping out of pixel trash bins across the neon alleyway. Pixel Raccoon whacks them with a lid-shield chaining combos as faster sprites emerge from the dumpsters.
games.objective: Master the whack challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Bear Merge
games.description: Merge honeycomb pixels into bigger better bears in the Forest of Frames. Pixel Bear starts as a cub and evolves through forms by combining identical sprites in this retro merger.
games.objective: Master the merge challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Panda Tower
games.description: Build pixel fortifications around the bamboo server farm. Pixel Panda places defenses against virus-creatures trying to corrupt the mainframe in this retro tower defense.
games.objective: Master the tower defense challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Bunny Stack
games.description: Stack pixel carrot crates as high as the moon in the Bunny Warehouse. Pixel Stacker times each placement as the wobbling tower narrows toward the retro skyline.
games.objective: Master the stacker challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Fox Memory
games.description: Flip pixel tiles in the ancient fox shrine to reveal matching glyphs. Pixel Fox Scholar remembers fallen leaf patterns in this pixel-perfect memory game.
games.objective: Master the memory challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Prawn Brick Bash
games.description: Crack through layers of corrupted data bricks in the deep-sea server trench. Pixel Prawn Breaker bounces a debug-ball through error blocks to reach the clean data core.
games.objective: Master the breakout challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Bear Bounce
games.description: Bounce a pixel bear through the honey-sweet clouds of the color-space continuum. Pixel Bear Bouncer rebounds between platforms collecting pixel nectar.
games.objective: Master the climber challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Raccoon Maze
games.description: Navigate a sprawling pixel junkyard maze to find the Golden Memory Shard. Pixel Raccoon Explorer uses night-vision to spot hidden paths through the scrap heap.
games.objective: Master the maze challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Bunny Blast
games.description: Defend the pixel carrot garden from hungry glitch-rabbits using a carrot cannon. Pixel Bunny Shooter upgrades firepower between waves in this retro shooter.
games.objective: Master the shooter challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Panda Idle
games.description: Build a pixel panda empire from a single bamboo shoot. Click to plant hire helpers and automate your grove. Pixel Panda Entrepreneur expands across the retro landscape.
games.objective: Master the idle clicker challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Fox Pong
games.description: A retro pixel pong duel under neon stadium lights. Pixel Fox Athlete volleys the energy ball as pixel fans cheer every rally in this arcade classic.
games.objective: Master the pong challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Bear Serpent
games.description: Guide a pixel bear snake through honeycomb grids collecting glowing nectar. Pixel Bear Serpent winds through retro tunnels where one wrong pixel means starting over.
games.objective: Master the snake challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Glitch Guardian
games.description: Scan every pixel of a vintage CRT monitor and blast corrupt glitches, rogue sprites, and virus anomalies before they crash the system. Debug Duck keeps the display clean in this retro light-gun shooter.
games.objective: Master the light-gun gallery challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Vector Vortex
games.description: Pilot a wireframe viper through a neon vortex of geometric enemies. Every triangle, hexagon, and diamond splits on impact — survive the fractal storm in this pure vector-graphics arena.
games.objective: Master the vector space combat challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Cassette Courier
games.description: Race through a neon-lit 80s suburb delivering mix tapes before sunset. Dodge sprinklers, barking dogs, and mailbox obstacles while the chiptune soundtrack builds speed. Every successful delivery unlocks a new cassette color.
games.objective: Master the delivery runner challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Pixel Plumber
games.description: Rotate and connect leaking pixel pipes before the basement floods. Each dripping joint and pressure gauge adds challenge as Piper Penguin races against the rising water in this retro pipe-dream puzzle.
games.objective: Master the pipe puzzle challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Chiptune Chase
games.description: Tap in time with an original chiptune soundtrack as Beat Bunny sprints through a retro city. Every beat-perfect step lights up the skyline, builds the city block by block, and unlocks hidden demo tracks.
games.objective: Master the rhythm runner challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Disk Drive Dash
games.description: Navigate the concentric tracks of a 5.25-inch floppy disk, collecting file fragments while dodging bad sectors, fragmentation ghosts, and corrupted clusters. Sector Squirrel must recover every byte before the drive head crashes.
games.objective: Master the data dodger challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: 8-Bit Bakery
games.description: Run a pixel-perfect bakery in a retro shopping district. Take orders from a growing queue of hungry patrons, assemble pastries with timed precision, and serve before patience runs out. Each perfect serve earns a digital tip.
games.objective: Master the time management challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Scanline Sprint
games.description: Fall through the scanlines of an old CRT television, rotating the display to guide the beam through gaps in the raster pattern. Dodge static interference, collect phosphor glow boosts, and survive the vertical descent through analog TV channels.
games.objective: Master the crt drop challenge and beat your personal best.

games.title: Petroman: Reactor Rush
games.description: Blast across the Petro City skyline with a twin-boost reactor belt. Secure unstable energy cores in sequence, build huge Spark Chains, dodge Smoglets and Volt Hawks, then trigger Purifier Mode to clean the sky.
games.objective: Collect every energy core in order and clear all eight stages without losing your Spark Chain.

games.title: Petroman: Bubble Blitz
games.description: Petroman cleans up Mango Metro one bubble at a time. Trap smog creatures in clean-air bubbles, pop them before they escape, chain score multipliers and defeat the Smog King across twelve handcrafted stages.
games.objective: Trap and pop every smog creature on each stage, then bring down the Smog King.

games.title: Petroman: Core Digger Deluxe
games.description: A hand-drawn dig-and-chase arcade adventure through Petro City’s core network. Tunnel out huge caverns, fire purifier orbs, drop reactor drums on pursuers and clear every stage your own way.
games.objective: Clear each cavern by purifying every pursuer or collecting the full core payload.

games.title: Petroman: Blast Zone
games.description: Petroman clears Petro City with Purifier Charges. Blow through soft cover, set off chain reactions, uncover hidden upgrades and reactor cores across six hand-painted worlds.
games.objective: Clear every smog enemy on a stage, then reach the reactor core exit.
